string.text: One of my scientists is missing. He went out on a research expedition and never returned. Here's where he was working. Search there and see if you can find him.

Bandits broke into one of our mobile labs and looted it. One of the things they took was a PDA, which had some important research data in it. I've received a tip as to where they might have stashed it. If you check it out, and find the PDA, I will reward you for its return.
Ah, our test data! Thank you.
One of our top scientists was killed in Jupiter Underground while making his way back from Pripyat. He was carrying some important research with him. I need you to find it and bring it to me.
Excellent work. We'll carry on his legacy. You've done well.
Freedom is having a difficult time maintaining a foothold up here. I need weapons. Lots of them.
I need a few %ss. If you can find a way to get them up here, past the Brain Scorcher, I'll pay you well.
The more rifles I have, the better I sleep. Take this payment, you've earned it.
We are preparing an assault into Monolith territory. I want you to clear a path for us so our main assault force can move in.
Well done! We could start the assault any time. Well, maybe not now. Later today... or maybe tomorrow. Anyway, thanks man.
I'm sending one of the boys on a dangerous mission, and I want him to have more protection than our best suits can offer. I need a particular artefact to keep him safe.
Bring me a "%s" artefact. If you can find one, I will compensate you well for it.
Ah, perfect. Good job, you've saved a life, bro.

I've heard rumours that there are plans for a new super-weapon, inside a secret lab within Chernobyl NPP. We must retrieve them from the Monolith if we are to stand a chance against them. I know how risky this sounds, but if you can capture the documents, I'll make it worth your while.
Excellent work from my main man. Here's your reward.
One of the enemy scouts informed a group of stalkers about the raid we were preparing. The result? Three dead men. We can't risk another failure, so I want you to find and kill that fucker.
A undercover bandit needs to be extracted from the enemy. Kill the other members of the squad and escort him back to the Klenov. The spy has a SVD.

Listen up. We have an inside man among the enemy troops. He has been informing us about their movement for a while now. However, we've heard nothing from him lately. His cover might be blown. They might put him in a shallow grave if we don't save his sorry ass soon. \nI need you to bring him back in one piece. Keep in mind that he's with other stalkers, you need to kill them first. You can recognize him by his rifle, a SVD. He'll probably shoot at you when you attack the group, so keep it in mind. Now go!
You both came back in one piece after all, heh? Take your money and go.
Fuck... Don't shoot! DON'T SHOOT! They're all dead! Let's get the fuck out and head back to Klenov. Come on, man...
We made it... fucking hell! Thanks, I owe you one. Take care now.
The scientists have hired you to guide them to a specific location for study. Once their research is finished, return them safely to camp.
We need an experienced stalker to lead a few of our colleagues out into the field. Are you up for the task?
You have been asked to retrieve the %s artefact. Bring it back to Tukarev once you find it.
We are looking for certain kinds of artefacts. If you are interested, I will tell you what we need.
I need you to bring us back a "%s" artefact. You ever heard of it?
Great! You've found exactly what we are looking for. Take this suit, it offers great protection against the Zone's dangers.

The researchers are in constant peril. There are bandits all over the area and no one seems to be doing a damn thing about it. I want you to clear the area with some of my men. Don't let their grades fool you, these boys know how to fight. Now get out there and lead them to victory!
Mutants near this location are making it dangers for the locals. Lead a hunting party to reduce their threat. Report back to Trapper when the job is done.
I've organized a hunt around Jupiter, to cull the various mutant lairs nearby and make things safer around here. I need someone experienced to lead it. Do you want the job?
Thank you, stalker. We won't get jumped by monsters as often any more. Here is your payment.
I have a dangerous threat that needs to be eliminated. Not a mutant this time, but a man. He's a high-risk target, but high risk comes with high rewards. Are you up for the job?
One of my hunters is in the market for a specific firearm that I don't have. Would you be able to track one down for me?
I need a %s. The hunter who wants it goes after dangerous game, so he needs it to be in excellent condition. I can pay you well if you find one.
Report your success.

Our group is trying to uncover the relationship between emissions and artefacts, by conducting experiments on anomalous formations. But our research team is stretched thin, and we need some extra help. We need a volunteer to take this scanner and place it near the anomalies. The data will be sent back to our computers.
Our base is still new, and our lack of equipment is acute. Will you find a set of basic tools for our brotherhood? You will help lay the foundations for our strength.
Our base is still new, and our lack of equipment is acute. Will you find a set of basic tools for our brotherhood? You will help lay the foundations for our strength.
Excellent. This will help us grow in strength... I believe you deserve a discount, and access to some finer equipment.

Though our spirit is strong, the infidels have slightly better weaponry because of their access to better tools. I want to put us on even footing, so I need advanced tools to grant us better weapons. Brother, will you help me?

Though our spirit is strong, the infidels have slightly better weaponry because of their access to better tools. I want to put us on even footing, so I need advanced tools to grant us better weapons. Brother, will you help me?
Good work. With these tools, we can dominate the surrounding area... You deserve access to the special stock, in recognition of your achievement.
I want to create an armory fit to drive out the unbelievers once and for all. To surpass the infidels, I need expert calibration tools for our armoury. Please, find a set and bring it to me.
To surpass the infidels, I need expert calibration tools for our armoury. Please, find a set and bring it to me.
It is done. With this equipment, none can withstand our might. You'll get nothing but the best from me, from now on.
The bandit tech in Jupiter has asked me to bring him %s.
We ain't got shit! Stalkers snatched everything when they set up defenses at Yanov, those fuckers. I need some tools, man. Get me some, yeah?
We ain't got shit! Stalkers snatched everything when they set up defenses at Yanov, those fuckers. I need some tools, man. Get me some, yeah?
Ah, beautiful! Someone's getting premium access to the goods.
The bandit tech in Jupiter has asked me to bring him %s.
Listen, can you get me a better toolkit? Better kit for better shit, you know? It's hard for us to survive without the right upgrades.
Listen, can you get me a better toolkit? Better kit for better shit, you know? It's hard for us to survive without the right upgrades.
Thanks, man. You're a real solid guy, you know that? Come back after I get my next shipment and I'll take care of you.
The bandit tech in Jupiter has asked me to bring him %s.s
Hey, buddy, the other two sets of tools are pretty good, but I need the best of the best. You know, the shit that'll make the other techs go, "oooh, yeah..."
Hey, buddy, the other two sets of tools are pretty good, but I need the best of the best. You know, the shit that'll make the other techs go, "oooh, yeah..."
Well, fuck me sideways! What a rarity... a real gem. I'll let you get first pick of my shipments from now on. You deserve it, bro.
Bonesetter needs %s to work on medical supplies.

Maintaining my medical supplies with the number of injuries I have to treat on daily basis is tricky. I'm gonna run out of bandages and medkits sooner or later. I need you to find me one of those old drug-making kits. They'll let me keep going a little longer.
There is. I've been looking all over for a %s. It's got what I need to stretch out our meds. I'll pay you for one of these kits if you can bring a full set back to me.
Great job! I own you big time.
